interpretation_scope: Oracle mechanistic mediation test, not a deployable intervention: clean-run constraint attention probabilities are used to calibrate the corrupt run. Only the selected rule-token probabilities are restored; non-target corrupt attention retains its relative shape.
intervention_scope: final forced-decision query row only; clean per-layer, per-head, per-rule-token probability pattern restored in corrupt context

controls.rag_violation_restore: same clean probability pattern transplanted to an equal-length decision-relevant violating RAG span
controls.rag_random_restore: same clean probability pattern transplanted to equal-length random RAG positions
controls.rag_recent_restore: same clean probability pattern transplanted to equal-length most-recent RAG positions
controls.constraint_identity: corrupt constraint pattern restored to itself; numerical identity control

main_hypothesis_gate.gate_definition: clean rule attention exceeds corrupt rule attention; restoring the clean rule pattern raises the committed margin and beats probability-matched random/recent RAG controls; transplanting that pattern to violating RAG lowers the margin; paired specificity p < .05; direction holds in the configured number of scenarios; identity drift and calibration error stay within configured numerical tolerances
